visuals.detailed_description: A single ringed upright figure holding its own self-image aloft as a tool in a hush of narrowed light, the held self lit brilliantly while the figure that holds it dims toward shadow -- self-assertion deepened into a mastery that has begun to vacate the one who wields it.

factorization.gloss: Three squared: the Three of Avowals fulfilled and turned inward -- generativity become the self-sustaining self-presence the 'I' generates on its own.

meaning.upright: Self-assertion's generativity fulfilled and turned inward -- the avowal producing avowal until selfhood becomes a self-sustaining understanding, the 'I' that has claimed itself so thoroughly it now generates its own self-presence. Reflexive creation matured into a standing, self-aware wholeness.
meaning.inverted: Self-understanding closed into a loop -- the self generating only itself, an 'I' feeding on its own avowals until it has forgotten the experiencing it was about. The ontic shadow: a self-sustaining self-image with no self left inside it.

visuals.detailed_description: Streams of upright ringed forms looping back to feed their own source and locking into structured articulate light, each avowal igniting the next -- a fire of self-assertion whose fuel is its own self-presence, generation upon generation of the claimed 'I'.

factorization.gloss: Two times five: the Two of Avowals meets the Five -- the standing identity stressed by the unclaimable experiencing until the self turns over into a truer one.

meaning.upright: The standing self stressed until it turns over -- the settled identity meeting the experiencing that breaks it, an 'I' completing by yielding to what unmakes it, dying into a truer self. Self-definition spilling past the identity that held it, lit from within at the moment of the turn.
meaning.inverted: The breaking self clung to as annihilation -- the overturning of identity treated as catastrophe rather than rebirth, the 'I' refusing the self it is becoming. The ontic shadow: a self that derealizes its own transformation to keep the old self-image intact.

visuals.detailed_description: A fully built structure of ringed upright forms caught at the instant of rotation, half already turned to shadow and half lit from within by contained radiance -- the avowed self pivoting under a final inward pressure, breaking open along its founding 'I'.

factorization.gloss: Prime (11): irreducible. First contact with Avowals as a genuinely new energy -- the apprentice's first true 'I', not reducible to the faculties beneath it.

meaning.upright: First contact with self-assertion -- the apprentice learning to say 'I' and mean it, claiming its own experiencing for the first time. Fresh, irreducible self-presence dawning, the first avowal settling into the ground of a self about to be built.
meaning.inverted: Self-assertion dabbled at -- the beginner saying 'I' without owning it, an avowal performed before there is a self to avow, the perpetual novice mistaking the word for the self-presence. The ontic shadow at its outset: a self claimed and not inhabited.

visuals.detailed_description: A young figure tentatively raising a first upright stroke within a faint ring, the avowal settling into warm dusk ground beneath it -- the apprentice's first 'I', self-presence dawning and beginning to take hold.

factorization.gloss: Two squared times three: the Frame of Avowals made to produce -- the standing self driven outward into full, extended self-assertion.

meaning.upright: The standing self driven outward to its extreme -- identity thrown into full assertive motion, the 'I' claimed at the highest pitch and pressed upon the world. The frame of selfhood made to produce, self-presence extended to its limit, even as it must still receive what the world returns.
meaning.inverted: Self-assertion run to recklessness -- the 'I' flung outward without aim, identity broadcast at full force and grounded in nothing, the self performed so hard it overruns the experiencing it claims to express. The ontic shadow: a self all assertion and no presence.

visuals.detailed_description: A figure in committed motion driving its upright ringed self outward to the limit, lit from within yet arriving into flat receptive light -- self-assertion thrown to its furthest reach, pressed on a world that has yet to answer.

factorization.gloss: Prime (13): irreducible. Self-assertion internalized into character -- a transformation into quiet, fully inhabited self-possession that no analysis softens.

meaning.upright: Self-assertion internalized into character -- the 'I' so wholly inhabited that it shows only as a quiet self-possession, self-presence held inwardly and given receptively. Self-definition matured into a calm authority over one's own being, articulate to itself without display.
meaning.inverted: The keeper's self-possession turned to self-enclosure -- an 'I' so internal it admits no one, self-presence curdled into a guarded interiority that holds itself and shares nothing. The ontic shadow: a self perfectly possessed and perfectly withdrawn.

visuals.detailed_description: A seated figure in whom self-assertion has become stillness, a single ringed upright form resting in clear legible light, the self held quietly and wholly inhabited -- selfhood so internal it appears only as a calm, articulate presence.

factorization.gloss: Two times seven: the Two of Avowals meets the Seven -- the reflexive split directed by the power to reckon, self-assertion become the sovereign standard of selfhood. The deck's fullest phenomenal self-presence and, in inversion, its deepest ontic shadow -- the two faces of the self-defining 'I'.

meaning.upright: Self-assertion as directive authority -- the 'I' turned outward to define a self that becomes the standard others orient by, self-presence so complete it founds a world. Reflexive division wedded to reckoning: the fully self-defined consciousness at its noon, the avowal that sets the very terms of selfhood. This is Dewart's self-present consciousness sovereign over its own being -- and precisely because it is the most fully self-asserting card, it casts the longest ontic shadow.
meaning.inverted: The sovereign 'I' hollowed into pure ontic shadow -- self-definition so total it has handed its whole reality to the role it asserts, a consciousness that commands selfhood everywhere and is absent from itself entirely. Authority over one's own being narrowed to a self-image that dictates and a self that has gone elsewhere: the most accomplished self-assertion concealing the most complete self-alienation, 'I' as throne with no one upon it.

visuals.detailed_description: A standing figure holding a single radiant ringed 'I' aloft as law, the surrounding field ordered by the self they assert and struck into charged high-contrast focus -- self-presence at its fullest authority, the avowed self casting a shadow as long and exact as its light.
